entities.context: Supplement recommended to increase when consuming alcohol or high-histamine foods

entities.name: Vitamin C
entities.context: Supplement recommended to increase when consuming alcohol or high-histamine foods

entities.name: Tirzepatide
entities.context: Medication V is using; primary risk is muscle loss requiring high protein intake

entities.name: Alcohol/Histamine Warning
entities.context: Guideline to increase NAC or Vitamin C when consuming alcohol or high-histamine foods; avoid on high-performance days

entities.name: Protein Non-Negotiable Principle
entities.context: Belief that protein intake is critical while on Tirzepatide — target 1.2g-1.5g per kg bodyweight daily, minimum 60-80g combined from shake and meal

entities.name: High-Performance Days
entities.context: Days where alcohol and high-histamine foods should ideally be avoided

relationships.context: NAC dosage should be increased when consuming alcohol or high-histamine foods
